issues.title: Add tags for embedded data
issues.body:
I've came over the following issue:
E.g. when feeding my vector db with multiple pdfs on different topics, e.g. K8S and some medical related topic brochure and asking LLM smth - the one started hallucinating mixing topics from K8S and medical brochure.

In this regard a request would be to add tags so that it is possible to give hints to LLM on which context the question relates to

comments.body:
The `DocumentReader `functionality has general support for adding metadata to a document during the loading phase. However, not all implementation allow adding custom metadata.

- `TextReader` -> Supported (see [example](https://github.com/ThomasVitale/llm-apps-java-spring-ai/blob/main/05-document-readers/document-readers-text-ollama/src/main/java/com/thomasvitale/ai/spring/DocumentInitializer.java#L39))
- `JsonReader` -> Supported (see [example](https://github.com/ThomasVitale/llm-apps-java-spring-ai/blob/main/05-document-readers/document-readers-json-ollama/src/main/java/com/thomasvitale/ai/spring/DocumentInitializer.java#L73))
- `PagePdfDocumentReader` and `PagePdfDocumentReader` -> No custom metadata (only default as shown [here](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/blob/main/document-readers/pdf-reader/src/main/java/org/springframework/ai/reader/pdf/PagePdfDocumentReader.java#L156) and [here](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/blob/main/document-readers/pdf-reader/src/main/java/org/springframework/ai/reader/pdf/ParagraphPdfDocumentReader.java#L164))
- `TikaDocumentReader ` -> No custom metadata (only default as shown [here](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/blob/main/document-readers/tika-reader/src/main/java/org/springframework/ai/reader/tika/TikaDocumentReader.java#L164))

When retrieving relevant documents, for supported vector stores (like [Chroma ](https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/reference/api/vectordbs/chroma.html#_metadata_filtering)or [Weaviate](https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/reference/api/vectordbs/weaviate.html#_metadata_filtering)), you can use filter expressions to include only documents labelled with certain metadata ([example](https://github.com/ThomasVitale/spring-boot-multitenancy/blob/main/chat-service/src/main/java/com/thomasvitale/chatservice/chat/DocumentChatService.java#L44)).

issues.title: Add vector data upload log
issues.body:
Hi,

While uploading a book onto vector db, it would be good to have an option to turn on status log saying how many docs processed/left to process as at some point i just thought nothing really happens, but in fact the program was still processing 100 pages pdf

comments.body: So adding a debug log inside the loop [here](https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/blob/5552a118aaeb69f8bbfdbd9c87d22c53254c2769/document-readers/pdf-reader/src/main/java/org/springframework/ai/reader/pdf/PagePdfDocumentReader.java#L103)?

I've added some logging, up to a max of 10 log statements in the PDF reader.  Reopen if this is not what you were expecting.

See 7b893410573184df4a1f8ff4f28525670d0b11ef

issues.title: is there doc about function call
issues.body:
below my application.yml about function calling configuration

chat:
  options:
    model: gpt-4
    tools: getCurrentWeather

And,this is my function:
public String getCurrentWeather(String location) {
        return location + "the weather is good";
    }

but it is not work,this is my log

Caused by: org.springframework.core.convert.ConverterNotFoundException: No converter found capable of converting from type [java.lang.String] to type [@com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonProperty java.util.List<org.springframework.ai.openai.api.OpenAiApi$FunctionTool>]
	at org.springframework.boot.context.properties.bind.BindConverter.convert(BindConverter.java:119)
	at org.springframework.boot.context.properties.bind.BindConverter.convert(BindConverter.java:101)
	at org.springframework.boot.context.properties.bind.IndexedElementsBinder.convert(IndexedElementsBinder.java:145)
	at org.springframework.boot.context.properties.bind.IndexedElementsBinder.bindValue(IndexedElementsBinder.java:95)
	at org.springframework.boot.context.properties.bind.IndexedElementsBinder.bindIndexed(IndexedElementsBinder.java:83)
	at org.springframework.boot.context.properties.bind.IndexedElementsBinder.bindIndexed(IndexedElementsBinder.java:70)
	at org.springframework.boot.context.properties.bind.CollectionBinder.bindAggregate(CollectionBinder.java:48)
	at org.springframework.boot.context.properties.bind.AggregateBinder.bind(AggregateBinder.java:56)
	at org.springframework.boot.context.properties.bind.Binder.lambda$bindAggregate$4(Binder.java:442)
	at org.springframework.boot.context.properties.bind.Binder$Context.withIncreasedDepth(Binder.java:597)
	at org.springframework.boot.context.properties.bind.Binder.bindAggregate(Binder.java:442)
	at org.springframework.boot.context.properties.bind.Binder.bindObject(Binder.java:403)
	at org.springframework.boot.context.properties.bind.Binder.bind(Binder.java:350)
	... 118 more
